items: Fixed sidebar presence showing 'Offline · just now' even while actively online — now shows '🟢 Online now' with green dot
Enhanced heartbeat system: 30-45s interval with activity-triggered updates (scroll, click, keypress, touch)
Visibility-aware heartbeat: fast mode (30s) when tab visible, slow mode (3min) when hidden
Added beforeunload handler with fetch+keepalive to mark user offline on tab close
Fixed navigator.sendBeacon auth issue — switched to fetch with keepalive for reliable offline signal
Browse page: 30s presence polling refreshes status dots without full page re-render
Chat page: partner status updates every 30s via existing polling loop
Search bar now searches bio, gender, and interests (not just names)
Fallback tags on member cards made deterministic per user ID — search now finds consistent tag matches
Haystack search approach: builds a single lowercase string from all member fields for fast matching
Server conversations endpoint: added lastSeen recency fallback (5-min window) alongside onlineUsers map
Added incremental search: filters as you type without page reload
Search bar binding moved from inline oninput to addEventListener for cross-browser reliability
added var (not let) for currentFilter to ensure inline handler accessibility
Fixed 'Active Now' filter on Discover page — now correctly filters by online + recently active users (15-min window)
Added heartbeat API endpoint (POST /api/heartbeat) to keep lastSeen fresh without WebSockets
Frontend heartbeat pings every 2 minutes — open a Spark tab to appear active
Active Now filter shows users online or active within 5 minutes (API-level) / 15 minutes (frontend-level)
Status dots on member cards now show green for recently-active users, not just socket-connected ones
Added fade transition when switching between filter pills
Empty state message when no active users are found
Active Now section hides automatically when a filter other than 'All' is selected
Refined auth card layout for 13-14 inch laptop screens — tighter vertical rhythm, reduced spacing
Reduced card padding, logo size, heading sizes, form gaps, and button heights for better laptop fit
Reduced background blob sizes, glow intensity, and floating element opacity for cleaner atmosphere
Updated input fields with inset shadows and password visibility toggle (eye icon)
Replaced emoji input icons with clean SVG icons across all auth forms
Refined tab toggle — softer green glow without harsh borders
Improved social divider with green gradient lines and proper Facebook SVG icon
Updated floating community text: 'Looking for new friends! ✨', 'Good vibes here ✨'
Added ambient glow particles for subtle background depth
Rewrote Privacy Policy with generic, privacy-forward tone — removed 'we collect', removed db.json/messages/photos specifics
Rewrote Terms section 6 (Privacy) with same neutral tone
Removed 'and Privacy Policy' link from login page terms note — shows only 'Terms'
Refined Discover page with premium card design, avatars, vibe tags, active now section
Added search bar and filter pills (All, Active Now, Recently Joined) to Discover page
Human status labels instead of 'Offline - Xm ago' (Active now, Recently active, New here)
Added Google OAuth login with Supabase (working - live)
Added Facebook OAuth login with Supabase (pending Facebook App setup in Supabase dashboard)
Created auth-callback.html page for OAuth redirect handling
Redesigned homepage auth card — wider (460px), premium glassmorphism, tighter spacing
Added social login buttons with Google and Facebook branding
Added input field icons (email, password, username) to login/register forms
Refined tab active state — softer green glow without border
Refined scrollbar, hover effects, and micro-interactions across all pages
Added floating social elements and ambient glow to homepage background
Polished Cebu brand identity — 'Meet real people around Cebu'
Terms and Privacy link added below social login section
Responsive design improvements for tablets and small screens
Batch multiple git commits before deploying to save Vercel free tier slots. Instead of pushing each change separately, accumulate changes locally and push them together with one deploy.
Workflow: make changes → test on localhost → commit → repeat → when ready, push all commits at once → deploy once
This way 1 deployment = 1 Vercel slot instead of 5+ for the same set of changes
Added mobile hamburger slide-out drawer menu with user profile and nav links
Changed nav labels: Browse to Discover, Chat to Messages
Redesigned chat input with Messenger-style pill, SVG icons (emoji, photo, send)
Fixed profile photo upload on Vercel (direct REST API to Supabase Storage)
Rewrote FAQ page for end-users (removed backend/admin content)
Created journey.html — full vibe coding story page with modern layout
Integrated multi-AI workflow: Claude (architecture), DeepSeek (coding), ChatGPT (design)
Cleaned up Vercel projects — deleted 3 duplicate projects
Added Database Access section to documentation
Updated workspace guide with localhost-first review workflow
Removed contact modal from profile page, added email link in footer
Removed em dashes from all public pages
Removed Socket.io references from docs (replaced with Supabase Realtime)
Mobile responsive styles added for all pages via style.css
Fixed footer spacing and hidden footer on chat page for immersive mobile view
Phase 1 — Supabase local setup: installed Docker Desktop and initialized local Supabase instance
Supabase running at http://127.0.0.1:54323 (Studio), port 54321 (API), 54322 (PostgreSQL)
Migration plan from lowdb (JSON) to Supabase (PostgreSQL) established
Project backup created before migration
Phase 2 — Created Supabase tables: users, messages, contacts
Phase 3 — Migrated existing data from db.json to Supabase (5 users, 19 messages, 2 contacts)
Phase 4 — Replaced all lowdb queries with @supabase/supabase-js across all routes and socket events
Phase 5 — Moved file uploads to Supabase Storage (profile photos, chat files)
Removed lowdb dependency from project
lowdb JSON database fully replaced by Supabase PostgreSQL
Created cloud Supabase project (CWD) at hpezaqvtufrvvczyixwc.supabase.co
Migrated data from local Supabase to cloud Supabase PostgreSQL
Created cloud Storage bucket for file uploads
Updated database.js and server.js with cloud Supabase credentials
App fully connected to cloud Supabase via localhost:3000
Created cloud Supabase project (CWD) for production
Migrated data and storage to cloud Supabase
Deployed app to Vercel at https://spark-social-app-ys49.vercel.app
Replaced Socket.io with Supabase Realtime for live chat messages
Added REST API endpoints for message CRUD operations
Uploaded profile photos and chat files to Supabase Storage
Updated photo URLs in database to point to cloud Storage
Fixed Supabase CDN to jsdelivr for reliable loading
Updated homepage hero text: 'Real conversations start here.' and subtitle: 'Meet people who match your vibe.'
Changed theme from pink to green (brand colors, hover effects, auth gradient)
Renamed nav label "Messages" to "Chat"
Renamed app from "dating" to "social" throughout
Added error logging system (logger.js, /api/logs, logs.html)
Added contact form on Profile page with Formspree integration
Added documentation.html — full HTML technical docs
Added Terms & Conditions page (terms.html)
Added Privacy Policy page (privacy.html)
Added FAQ & Troubleshooting page (faq.html)
Added auto edit mode for Reasonix
Fixed PDF generator alignment for feature sections
Moved Docs link from navbar to Admin panel
Replaced all em dashes with regular dashes across docs
Premium UI redesign — glassmorphism, ambient blobs, floating elements, noise texture
Improved login page with cinematic gradient, animated glow, premium card
Improved browse page with premium member cards, hover lift, soft background
Improved chat page — neutral background, message animations, online pulse, better bubbles
Fixed send button compression and avatar loading in chat
Added consistent ambient backgrounds across all pages via style.css
Initial release of Spark social app
User authentication (register, login, forgot/reset password, change password)
User profiles with photo upload, name, age, gender, bio
Member discovery with online/offline presence indicators
Real-time chat with emoji picker, file sharing, edit/delete messages
Unread badges and browser notifications
Admin panel with stats, user management, message logs
lowdb JSON database, Socket.io, JWT + bcrypt auth
Responsive frontend (HTML + CSS + Vanilla JS)
